summary: All four requirements are implemented in the diff. REQ-34 reduces the landing page logo to max 480px on desktop with responsive scaling and preserves dark mode inversion. REQ-35 adds the stable youtubeLink variable, includes it in getContent(), and adds updateYoutubeLink() with admin guard. REQ-36 adds the YouTube Link field to AdminDashboard with pre-population, save button, mutation, and feedback. REQ-37 updates VideoSection to accept youtubeLink as a prop from the CMS content query with graceful fallback. All acceptance criteria appear to be met.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend/migration.mo module was added to handle migration of the youtubeLink field during canister upgrades.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention adding a migration module or file. The requirement only specifies adding a stable variable in main.mo. The migration.mo file and its wiring via 'with migration = Migration.run' were not requested.
